result:
Build is fully green — `wpa_supplicant`, `wpa_cli`, and `wpa_passphrase` all linked successfully (only a pre-existing unrelated warning remains, no errors).

Fixed all 5 root-cause bugs:
1. `config_file.c:29` — `os_strlength` → `os_strlen` (nonexistent function name)
2. `src/utils/eloop.c:615` — `timeout->time.seconds` → `.sec` (wrong struct field)
3. `src/rsn_supp/wpa.c:103` — `sm->pairwise_ciph` → `pairwise_cipher` (wrong struct field)
4. `wpa_supplicant/events.c:132` — `wpa_s->cur_ssid` → `current_ssid` (wrong struct field)
5. `wpa_supplicant/scan.c:1137` — `eloop_register_timeout(...)` missing trailing `NULL` user_data arg (matched signature and sibling call sites)
